headline: BTG Pactual Turns Cautious on Tyson Foods (TSN) with Sell Rating
summary: Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE:TSN) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 13, BTG Pactual initiated coverage of Tyson Foods, Inc. (NYSE:TSN) with a Sell rating. The firm also set a $58 price target on the stock. During the fiscal Q1 2026 earnings call, CEO Donnie King said first-quarter results showed […]
